creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
I had found one more issue with 0.12 version and updated the port:
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/trac-mastertickets/3.0.1-fix-bad-__repr__.diff
Tinderbox builds are still fine, plugin is working on our Trac 0.12
instance.

Also pushed the bug upstream:
  http://trac-hacks.org/ticket/7607
-- 
Eygene
